title: No Pumpkin Head
description: Removes the annoying pumpkin blur effect for a clearer view while wearing a pumpkin
body:
Tired of the annoying pumpkin blur blocking your screen? This simple texture pack completely removes the pumpkin overlay, giving you a clear and unobstructed view while wearing a carved pumpkin. Perfect for PvP, survival, and building — keep the spooky look without losing visibility!

✅ Works on all game modes
✅ No performance impact
✅ Compatible with OptiFine, Fabric, and Vanilla
